auth.label: API Key
auth.description: SMS Alert API key sent as the apikey query parameter. Sign in to SMS Alert, open Developers, then API keys to view or create one: https://kb.smsalert.co.in/knowledgebase/api-kit/

actions.name: generate_otp
actions.description: Generate and send an OTP message through SMS Alert.

senderId.description: The sender ID used for the OTP message.

mobileNumber.description: The destination mobile number for the OTP.

template.description: The OTP template text, which must include the "[otp]" placeholder and may include optional length/retry/validity attributes.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for generating an OTP through SMS Alert.

message.description: The provider message returned by SMS Alert.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by SMS Alert.

items.description: One SMS Alert batch delivery entry.

deliveries.description: The batch delivery records returned by SMS Alert.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMS Alert batch operation response.

actions.name: get_credit_balance
actions.description: Get the remaining SMS Alert credits grouped by delivery route.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

summary.description: The raw balance summary string returned by SMS Alert.

displayName.description: The display name for this route in SMS Alert.

credits.description: The remaining credits for this route.

items.description: One SMS Alert balance route entry.

routes.description: The route-level balances available on the account.

outputSchema.description: The SMS Alert credit balance response.

actions.name: list_sender_ids
actions.description: List the sender IDs available in the SMS Alert account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

approved.description: Whether SMS Alert marks the sender as approved.

open.description: Whether the sender is currently open for use.

createdAt.description: The sender creation timestamp returned by SMS Alert.

items.description: One sender ID entry returned by SMS Alert.

senders.description: The sender IDs currently available for the account.

outputSchema.description: The SMS Alert sender list response.

actions.name: list_templates
actions.description: List SMS templates from the SMS Alert account with optional pagination.

order.description: The sort order for template listing.

page.description: The 1-based page number to request from SMS Alert.

limit.description: The page size to request from SMS Alert.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing SMS Alert templates.

createdAt.description: The template creation timestamp returned by SMS Alert.

items.description: One template entry returned by SMS Alert.

templates.description: The SMS templates currently available for the account.

outputSchema.description: The SMS Alert template list response.

actions.name: send_sms
actions.description: Send a direct SMS message through SMS Alert.

senderId.description: The sender ID assigned to your SMS Alert account.

mobileNumbers.description: One or more destination numbers, separated by commas when sending to multiple recipients.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for sending a direct SMS through SMS Alert.

message.description: The provider message returned by SMS Alert.

batchId.description: The batch identifier returned by SMS Alert.

items.description: One SMS Alert batch delivery entry.

deliveries.description: The batch delivery records returned by SMS Alert.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMS Alert batch operation response.

actions.name: validate_otp
actions.description: Validate an OTP code previously generated through SMS Alert.

mobileNumber.description: The destination mobile number used during OTP generation.

code.description: The OTP code entered by the user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for validating an OTP through SMS Alert.

matched.description: Whether SMS Alert reported that the OTP matched.

message.description: The provider validation message returned by SMS Alert.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMS Alert OTP validation response.
